name: T.C.J. Asia Public Company Limited
summary: T.C.J. Asia Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, imports and distributes machinery and lifting equipment for construction work, and loading and unloading services in Thailand and internationally. It provides tractors, wheel loaders, road rollers, excavator, and cranes. The company also manufactures and distributes stainless steel pipes, as well as trades in stainless steel products. In addition, it is involved in the rental and repair of cranes and trucks; and installation works, as well as operates as a construction contractor. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Bang Phli, Thailand.
